reasoning: Both models failed to analyze the PKGBUILD (critical build script) due to incorrect binary file detection, leaving all security-critical components unexamined. No actual code was reviewed.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (core build script) was incorrectly skipped as binary
No review of package()/build() functions, checksums, or source URLs
No analysis of potential install hooks or build-time scripts
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD: unsigned sources, unsafe build commands, malicious hooks
Possible privilege escalation in install scripts
learnings: Improve binary detection heuristics - PKGBUILDs should never be treated as binary files
Prioritize PKGBUILD analysis even if initial parsing fails
Add fallback mechanisms for corrupted/malformed PKGBUILD inspection
Implement explicit priority for build-related files over other repository content
